home.title:
Feeling sleepy?
Just tap.
home.subtitle: We'll do the math. You'll wake up at just the right time.
home.coffeeCustomInputA11y: Enter how many minutes ago you drank coffee (0–120 min)
home.coffeeNotice: Caffeine is already kicking in — we'll set the minimum wait time
home.learnNote: These are literature-based defaults. If they feel off, you can adjust them in feedback or settings
home.learnNoteBold: Current times — fall asleep fast {{fast}} min · toss and turn {{slow}} min

sleep.wakeAtCoffee: We'll wake you at {{time}}, timed with your caffeine
sleep.permissionHint: Keep the app open for the alarm to ring
sleep.permissionHintAndroid: The alarm may not ring without notification permission — please allow it in Settings

alarm.title: Time to wake up
alarm.subtitle:
5 more minutes will only leave you groggier from sleep inertia.
Getting up right now feels best.
alarm.coffeeBadge: Caffeine effects are kicking in now
alarm.longPressHint: If sliding is hard, press and hold this area for 3 seconds instead

feedback.title: How was your nap?
feedback.subtitle: Even a quick check gets saved as a record.
feedback.statusDefault: My sleep latency: fall asleep {{fast}} min · toss and turn {{slow}} min
feedback.tipCaption: Ways to wake up refreshed — check off what you did
feedback.toastManualAdjust: '{{modeName}}' {{label}} set to {{minutes}} min for next time.

history.title: Nap history
history.aiAnalysisCaptionMin: You can analyze once you have {{count}} nap records

settings.title: Settings

rowLabel.fast: Sleep latency — I'll fall asleep fast
rowLabel.slow: Sleep latency — I might toss and turn

settings.consentGranted: Consented to sending data for AI analysis
settings.consentNotGranted: Not consented to sending data for AI analysis

analysisConsent.title: About AI Analysis
analysisConsent.paragraph1: To generate the analysis, your nap records (times, survey answers, notes) are sent to our server. The data sent is used only to create suggestions and advice for adjusting your wait time and caffeine onset time.
analysisConsent.paragraph2: Suggestions are for reference only — they're applied to your settings only when you tap to apply them yourself.

analysisPeriod.title: AI Analysis
analysisPeriod.subtitle: Which period should we analyze?
analysisPeriod.countCaption: This period has fewer than {{min}} records, so it can't be analyzed. Try a different period.

analysisReport.title: AI Analysis
analysisReport.insufficientCreditMessage: You've used this week's free analysis.
analysisReport.errorFallback: The analysis request failed. Please try again.

serverError.notEnoughRecords: Not enough nap records to analyze.
serverError.turnLimitReached: You've used all your follow-up questions.

analysisReport.recordsUsedText: Based on the most recent {{count}} records
analysisReport.disclaimer: This report is general sleep hygiene information, not a medical diagnosis or advice. If symptoms persist, please consult a professional.
